title: Manage and develop teams
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage and develop teams demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Promote team effectiveness

pcs.text: Clearly define and communicate team goals and roles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clearly define and communicate team goals and roles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clearly define and communicate team goals and roles.

pcs.text: Promote respect for team members through coaching and modelling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Promote respect for team members through coaching and modelling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Promote respect for team members through coaching and modelling.

pcs.text: Achieve balanced participation in discussions and activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Achieve balanced participation in discussions and activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Achieve balanced participation in discussions and activities.

pcs.text: Negotiate work roles to balance team goals, job requirements and team members’ strengths, experience, work styles and career goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate work roles to balance team goals, job requirements and team members’ strengths, experience, work styles and career goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate work roles to balance team goals, job requirements and team members’ strengths, experience, work styles and career goals.

pcs.text: Apply effective conflict resolution processes and implement them fairly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply effective conflict resolution processes and implement them fairly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply effective conflict resolution processes and implement them fairly.

pcs.text: Provide effective links between senior management, other teams and the work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide effective links between senior management, other teams and the work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide effective links between senior management, other teams and the work team.

pcs.text: Encourage networking to share experiences, expertise and resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Encourage networking to share experiences, expertise and resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Encourage networking to share experiences, expertise and resources.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Promote team effectiveness

elements.title: Identify and develop individual potential

pcs.text: Assess each team member’s strengths and weaknesses against documented job performance requirements and identify training and development options in consultation with them
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess each team member’s strengths and weaknesses against documented job performance requirements and identify training and development options in consultation with them?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess each team member’s strengths and weaknesses against documented job performance requirements and identify training and development options in consultation with them.

pcs.text: Provide opportunities to develop skills through allocation/rotation of work tasks and roles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide opportunities to develop skills through allocation/rotation of work tasks and roles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide opportunities to develop skills through allocation/rotation of work tasks and roles.

pcs.text: Encourage the sharing of knowledge and skills through coaching, mentoring and shadowing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Encourage the sharing of knowledge and skills through coaching, mentoring and shadowing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Encourage the sharing of knowledge and skills through coaching, mentoring and shadowing.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and develop individual potential

elements.title: Monitor individual and team performances

pcs.text: Review each team member’s performance on a regular basis with the individual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review each team member’s performance on a regular basis with the individual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review each team member’s performance on a regular basis with the individual.

pcs.text: Recognise achievements and address problems with performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise achievements and address problems with performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise achievements and address problems with performance.

pcs.text: Provide constructive feedback on the performance of the team and team members
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide constructive feedback on the performance of the team and team members?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide constructive feedback on the performance of the team and team members.

pcs.text: Record information relating to individual and team performance in accordance with workplace and statutory procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record information relating to individual and team performance in accordance with workplace and statutory procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record information relating to individual and team performance in accordance with workplace and statutory procedures.
